name: Ghurrag Ironmace
sd_appearance: Massive orc, towering over others, deep green skin speckled with battle scars, prominent tusks glinting under dim light. Yellow eyes hold a cold intensity, reflecting the flickering candlelight within a gloomy cult chamber. Ghurrag, Speaker of Brother Thane's Cult, stands robed in tattered grey wrappings, his makeshift metal-banded staff in one hand, a hidden dagger at his waist. One distinctive visual detail: intricate tattoos of his deity, glowing eerily in the dim light, cover Ghurrag's broad back, marking him as a revered leader within the Undercity's twisted realm.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: cult's grey wrappings, makeshift metal-banded staff, fervent expression
